items.definition_en: Confusion is the feeling when you do not understand something.
items.example_en: He felt confusion when he read the message.

items.definition_en: Curiosity is the desire to learn or know more.
items.example_en: Children have a lot of curiosity about the world.

items.definition_en: Sympathy is caring about someone’s suffering or problems.
items.example_en: She showed sympathy for her friend’s loss.

items.definition_en: Surprise is the feeling when something unexpected happens.
items.example_en: My birthday party was a big surprise for me.

items.definition_en: Satisfaction is feeling happy with what you did or got.
items.example_en: He felt satisfaction after finishing his work.

items.definition_en: Relief is feeling better after being worried or afraid.
items.example_en: She felt relief after hearing the good news.

items.definition_en: Courage is being brave even when you are scared.
items.example_en: He showed courage during the difficult situation.

items.definition_en: Interest is wanting to know or learn about something.
items.example_en: Her interest in music grew over time.

items.definition_en: Suspicion is thinking that something may be wrong.
items.example_en: He had a suspicion that his friend was lying.

items.definition_en: Disbelief is the feeling of not believing something.
items.example_en: She stared in disbelief at the broken vase.

items.definition_en: Anticipation is the feeling of waiting for something to happen.
items.example_en: There was anticipation before the concert started.

items.definition_en: Kindness is being nice and helpful to others.
items.example_en: A little kindness can make someone's day better.

items.definition_en: Admiration is the feeling of respecting and liking someone.
items.example_en: He looked at her with admiration.

items.definition_en: Tension is the feeling of stress or worry between people.
items.example_en: There was tension in the room during the meeting.

items.definition_en: Longing is a strong feeling of wanting something or someone.
items.example_en: She felt a deep longing for her home.

items.definition_en: Indifference is not caring about something or someone.
items.example_en: He showed indifference to the outcome of the game.
